text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's senior year summer camp is about to
begin. But something else is on her mind...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oguri and the others are plannin' to kick things
into full gear come the end of camp.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If I want a chance at beatin' 'em, I've gotta use
this time to really toughen up.
choice_data_list: This'll be an intense camp for you then.
This'll be an intense camp for you then.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No duh! Easy doesn't get ya to the top! I say bring
on the fiery pits of hell if that's what it'll take!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins a very intense summer camp!
